description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on push to master branch and tags, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build and cppcheck. The build job runs on a matrix of Linux, macOS, and Windows environments with different compilers and shells, installing dependencies, checking out code, configuring, building, and testing the project. The cppcheck job runs on ubuntu-latest, installing cppcheck and running it on the code.
